debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ₂ T x : ℝ
K : ℕ
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1
t_seq : Fin (K + 2) → ℝ
ht0 : t_seq 0 = max (FKS.Hσ (FKS.Inputs.H₀ I) (FKS.Inputs.R I) σ₂) (exp (√(log x) / FKS.Inputs.R I))
htK : t_seq (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T
ht_incr : StrictMono t_seq
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq 0))) / t_seq 0 ∧
    FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤
      2 *
          ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K + 1)),
            riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) *
              (x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq (k - 1)))) / t_seq (k - 1) -
                x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq k))) / t_seq k) +
        x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc))) / t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc *
          riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T

failed_attempts:
have h_eq := eq_13 I.hH₀ I.hR (a := σ₂) (b := 1) (T := T) (x := x)
  rw [h_eq]
  constructor
  · sorry
  · sorry

let g (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hg_mono : AntitoneOn g (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := by sorry
  have h_sigma_le : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Icc σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioc (t_seq 0) T) (fun ρ ↦ g ρ.im) := by sorry
  constructor
  · -- Bound by N(T) * sup(g)
    sorry
  · -- Bound by partial summation
    sorry

have h_eq := eq_13 I.hH₀ I.hR
  sorry

have hR := I.hR
  have hH₀ := I.hH₀
  rw [eq_13 hH₀ hR]
  sorry

have h_mono : AntitoneOn (fun t ↦ x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t) (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := sorry
  constructor <;> sorry

let f (t : ℝ) := x ^ (-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn f (Set.Icc (t_seq 0) T) := by
    -- The function is decreasing for t >= exp(sqrt(log x)/R), which t_seq 0 satisfies.
    sorry
  constructor
  · -- Bound using N(T) and max value of f
    sorry
  · -- Refined bound using summation by parts over the partition t_seq
    sorry

let w (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hw : ∀ t, w t = x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t := fun _ ↦ rfl
  -- The function w(t) is decreasing for t ≥ t₀
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn w (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := sorry
  -- No zeroes before t₀
  have h_N0 : riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq 0) = 0 := sorry
  -- Bound each term in the sum
  have h_term : ∀ ρ, riemannZeta.nontrivial_zero ρ → 0 < ρ.im → σ₂ ≤ ρ.re → x ^ (ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im ≤ w ρ.im := sorry
  -- Relate Sigma to sum of w
  have h_sigma_bound : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioc (t_seq 0) T) (fun ρ ↦ w ρ.im) := sorry
  constructor
  · -- First inequality: sum w(γ) ≤ N(T) w(t₀)
    rw [hw]
    apply le_trans h_sigma_bound
    sorry
  · -- Second inequality: Abel summation
    rw [hw]
    apply le_trans h_sigma_bound
    sorry

let g (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hg : ∀ t, g t = x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t := fun _ ↦ rfl
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn g (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := by sorry
  have h_sigma_bound : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioc (t_seq 0) T) (fun ρ ↦ g ρ.im) := by sorry
  constructor
  · refine le_trans h_sigma_bound ?_
    rw [mul_le_mul_left (by norm_num)]
    -- Use monotonicity of g and definition of N'
    sorry
  · refine le_trans h_sigma_bound ?_
    -- Apply partial summation formula
    sorry

let h (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn h (Set.Icc (t_seq 0) T) := sorry
  have h_N0 : riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq 0) = 0 := sorry
  have bound1 : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * h (t_seq 0)) := sorry
  have bound2 : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) * (h (t_seq (k - 1)) - h (t_seq k)) ) + h (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc) * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T := sorry
  exact ⟨bound1, bound2⟩

let h (t : ℝ) := x ^ (-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn h (Set.Icc (t_seq 0) T) := sorry
  have bound : ∀ ρ ∈ riemannZeta.zeroes (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T), x ^ (ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im ≤ h ρ.im := sorry
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · -- First inequality
    sorry
  · -- Second inequality
    sorry

let f (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have h_mono : ∀ t₁ t₂, t_seq 0 ≤ t₁ → t₁ ≤ t₂ → f t₂ ≤ f t₁ := sorry
  have h_sum : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * ∑ k in Finset.range (K + 1), (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq (k + 1)) - riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k)) * f (t_seq k) := sorry
  constructor
  · apply le_trans h_sum
    rw [mul_le_mul_left (by norm_num)]
    calc
      _ ≤ ∑ k in Finset.range (K + 1), (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq (k + 1)) - riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k)) * f (t_seq 0) := sorry
      _ = (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T) * f (t_seq 0) := sorry
  · apply le_trans h_sum
    rw [mul_le_mul_left (by norm_num)]
    sorry -- Follows from Abel summation identity

let f (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hf_mono : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (t_seq 0) T, AntitoneOn f (Set.Icc t T) := by sorry
  have hf_start : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (t_seq 0), f t ≤ f (t_seq 0) := by sorry
  have h_bound : ∀ ρ, ρ.im ∈ Set.Ioo 0 T → ρ.re ∈ Set.Icc σ₂ 1 → riemannZeta.zeta ρ = 0 → x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im ≤ f ρ.im := by sorry
  have sigma_le : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ f ρ.im) := by sorry
  
  constructor
  · apply le_trans sigma_le
    rw [← htK]
    apply le_trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_le_N_mul_max _ _ _ _ (by sorry)) zero_le_two)
    sorry -- f(rho) <= f(t0)
  · apply le_trans sigma_le
    -- Summation by parts argument
    sorry

let g (t : ℝ) := x ^ (-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  -- The function g is decreasing for t ≥ t_seq 0
  have hg_mono : AntitoneOn g (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := by sorry
  
  -- Bound the sum using the zero-free region and the monotonicity of g
  have h_bound : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * ∑ ρ in riemannZeta.zeroes_in_box (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T), g ρ.im := by sorry
  
  constructor
  · -- First inequality: Σ g(ρ) ≤ N(T) * g(t_0)
    calc
      riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * ∑ ρ in riemannZeta.zeroes_in_box (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T), g ρ.im := h_bound
      _ ≤ 2 * (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * g (t_seq 0)) := by sorry -- Follows from g decreasing and N counting terms
      _ = 2 * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq 0))) / (t_seq 0) := by simp [g]
  
  · -- Second inequality: Discrete Abel summation
    calc
      riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * ∑ ρ in riemannZeta.zeroes_in_box (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T), g ρ.im := h_bound
      _ ≤ 2 * ((∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) * (g (t_seq (k - 1)) - g (t_seq k))) + g (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc) * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T) := by sorry
      _ = _ := by simp [g]; rfl

let g (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hg : ∀ t₁ t₂, t_seq 0 ≤ t₁ → t₁ ≤ t₂ → t₂ ≤ T → g t₂ ≤ g t₁ := by sorry
  have hN0 : riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq 0) = 0 := by sorry
  have key_est : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * ∑ k : Fin (K + 1), (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq (k.castSucc + 1)) - riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k.castSucc)) * g (t_seq k.castSucc) := by sorry
  constructor
  · have : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T - riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq 0)) * g (t_seq 0) := by sorry
    rw [hN0, sub_zero] at this
    exact this
  · apply le_trans key_est
    rw [← mul_le_mul_left (zero_lt_two : 0 < (2 : ℝ))]
    have id : (∑ k : Fin (K + 1), (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq (k.castSucc + 1)) - riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k.castSucc)) * g (t_seq k.castSucc)) =
              (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) * (g (t_seq (k - 1)) - g (t_seq k))) + g (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc) * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T := by sorry
    rw [id]
    apply le_of_eq
    congr 1
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k hk
    congr
constructor <;> sorry
constructor <;> sorry
constructor <;> sorry

let g (t : ℝ) := x ^ (-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn g (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := sorry
  have h_bound : ∀ ρ ∈ riemannZeta.zeroes (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T), x ^ (ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im ≤ g ρ.im := sorry
  constructor <;> sorry
exact ⟨sorry, sorry⟩

constructor
  · -- The first inequality is a crude bound using the maximum of the term
    sorry
  · -- The second inequality follows from summation by parts (Abel summation)
    sorry

-- The proof relies on partial summation (Abel summation) and the fact that the function
  -- h(t) = x^{-1/(R log t)} / t is decreasing for t ≥ t₀.
  -- t₀ includes Hσ which is large enough (≥ H₀ = 3e12) to ensure we are in the decreasing region.
  constructor
  · -- First inequality: Σ ≤ N(T) * h(t₀)
    -- This follows from bounding each term by h(t₀)
    sorry
  · -- Second inequality: Refined bound using the partition t_seq
    -- This follows from the summation by parts identity:
    -- Σ h(γ) ≤ ∑ N(t_k) (h(t_{k-1}) - h(t_k)) + N(T) h(T)
    sorry

let g (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hg : ∀ t ≥ t_seq 0, AntitoneOn g (Set.Ici t) := by sorry
  have h_bound : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ g ρ.im) := by sorry
  have h_sum : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ g ρ.im) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) * (g (t_seq (k - 1)) - g (t_seq k)) + g (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc) * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T := by sorry
  have h_mono : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico σ₂ 1) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ρ ↦ g ρ.im) ≤ riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * g (t_seq 0) := by sorry
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simp only [g] at h_mono
    exact le_trans h_bound (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_mono (by norm_num))
  · simp only [g] at h_sum
    refine le_trans h_bound (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (by norm_num))
    convert h_sum using 4
    · congr
    · simp

  · sorry

have h_eq := eq_13 I.hH₀ I.hR (a := σ₂) (b := 1) (T := T) (x := x)

let g (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have hg : ∀ t, g t = x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t := fun _ ↦ rfl
  -- The function g is decreasing for t ≥ t_seq 0 and g(t) ≤ g(t_seq 0) for t ≤ t_seq 0.
  have h_mono : AntitoneOn g (Set.Ici (t_seq 0)) := sorry
  have h_peak : ∀ t, 0 < t → t ≤ t_seq 0 → g t ≤ g (t_seq 0) := sorry
  -- Zeros of Zeta satisfy this bound derived from the zero-free region
  have h_bound : ∀ ρ, σ₂ ≤ ρ.re → 0 < ρ.im → x^(ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im ≤ g ρ.im := sorry
  
  constructor
  · -- Proof of first inequality
    rw [riemannZeta.Sigma]
    sorry
  · -- Proof of second inequality via Abel summation
    rw [riemannZeta.Sigma]
    sorry
constructor <;> sorry

  have h_bound : ∀ ρ, ρ.im ∈ Set.Ioo 0 T → σ₂ ≤ ρ.re → x ^ (ρ.re - 1) / ρ.im ≤ g ρ.im := sorry
